title: Magical Crunchy Tunisian Shiitake Mushrooms Tagine
description: A flavorful and crunchy Tunisian dish featuring shiitake mushrooms, salt-bake, and herbal spices, perfect for a festive dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced mushrooms with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the mushrooms in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the ground cumin and smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Add the baked mushrooms to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
